title: Phished Founder, Liquidated Thief
relevance_summary: Phishing followed by flash loan and liquidation on Venus Protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls delegate approval followed by a flash loan within a short timeframe

red_flags: Delegate approval followed by a flash loan within a short timeframe
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls delegate approval followed by a flash loan within a short timeframe
summary: A Venus Protocol whale fell victim to a phishing attack, which led to a series of transactions including a flash loan and liquidation, resulting in the loss of $13 million. A guard could have detected and blocked the transaction by monitoring for delegate approvals followed by flash loans within a short timeframe.
